visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a pink cardigan and a fuzzy black and white hat stands in a Costco warehouse in front of a pallet of pink chocolate boxes. She is gesturing with high energy, pointing at the products, making a heart shape with her hands, and eventually picking up a box to showcase it. (2) Close-up shots focus on the pink box packaging which features a bear and French branding. The woman then holds the box and continues to speak with animated facial expressions, including wide-eyed excitement and a broad smile. (3) The setting changes to an indoor living room where two women sit at a table piled with individually wrapped chocolates and the open pink box. One woman holds a halved chocolate close to the camera, revealing a white marshmallow center with a dark jelly core. (4) Both women interact with the chocolates, picking them up and pointing at the layers. They continue to talk and gesture, with one woman giving a thumbs up to the camera while holding a piece of candy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 話題新品 不容錯過. [Slogan]: 黑巧克力 覆盆莓棉花糖. (2) [Subtitle]: 語無倫次 這是什麼? 黑巧克力加 覆盆莓的巧克力. 又提愛心形狀 我的天啊. 直接來一盒. 好可愛的小熊喔. 329元有510克. 不覺得黑巧克力 配覆盆莓 感覺就很好吃嗎? 我只擔心它太甜. 不擔心它太可愛. 他有棉花糖耶. (3) [Slogan]: 要我吃也. (4) [Subtitle]: 希望它好吃. (5) [Slogan]: 黑巧克力 覆盆莓棉花糖. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個巧克力吃下來 超乎我的預期. 雖然打開的時候 它就只有這種 零散的透明包裝. 我覺得有點失望. 沒有那邊的可愛跟漂亮. (7) [Slogan]: 只有限於外盒. [Variety]: ★★★★. (8) [Subtitle]: 打開裡就是一個透明袋. 包裝心型巧克力. 沒錯但是不要管 外包裝的話. 它吃起來的口感 它這個黑巧克力 非常的薄脆. 然後棉花糖的口感非常的柔軟. 配上這個醬. 很濃郁! 我覺得很好吃. (9) [Slogan]: 最厲害是它的棉花糖. (10) [Subtitle]: 我覺得這巧克力 最厲害是它的棉花糖. 如果你愛吃棉花糖 你一定要試試它. 它的棉花糖真的是做得非常完美. 一定要試試看這個棉花糖. 主體就是棉花糖 超好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator throughout, 1 female companion appearing in the second half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair, wearing a fuzzy black and white hat, a pink knit cardigan over a light green top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half features high warehouse shelving and pallets of products at a Costco. The second half is a domestic living room with a couch, plush toys, and a warm interior light.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, cheerful synth-pop music begins immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy and rapid delivery. A 'pop' SFX is heard as the woman grabs a box. (2) The vocal track continues with high arousal, describing the product features. A subtle 'shimmer' sound effect highlights the visual of the packaging. (3) The recording environment shifts to a cleaner room tone with less reverb. Plastic rustling sounds become prominent as the creators handle the individually wrapped chocolates. (4) A bell 'ding' SFX signals the appearance of a rating on screen. The two female voices discuss the texture of the marshmallow and chocolate with a friendly, animated tone until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Showcase -> Detail Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a newly released chocolate product from Costco, emphasizing its taste, texture layers, and packaging value for consumers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, price information, and a rating of its taste.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form video typical of social media trends, using fast cuts and bright text overlays to maintain viewer attention.
